question: The bar chart shows the output from 2018 to 2022. Which statement best describes what can be concluded from the chart?

options.A: The two highest bars are cut off by the axis range, so their relative sizes cannot be determined from the chart.
options.B: Output decreased every year from 2018 to 2022.
options.C: Output in the last two years is the same.
options.D: Output in 2020 was higher than in both 2021 and 2022.

explanation: Values exceeding the y-axis range are clipped, making the top bars look the same and misleading viewers.
